channel.title: Fp on Clockwork
channel.description: Recent content in Fp on Clockwork

item.title: Refactoring Kotlin type-signatures for fun and profit
item.description: tl;dr “You can apply simple refactoring and functional techniques such as substitution and currying to refine function signatures. Free of any implementation detail, defining system concepts in this way can be a refreshingly powerful technique.

item.title: Smash your Adapter Monolith with the Connect pattern
item.description: TL;DR “Breaking down monolithic remote API Clients into individual Actions sharing a common single-function Protocol interface allows them to not only be more decoupled at the code layer, but also simplifies both testing and extensibility.
